personality_one_liner: A secure, premium, and trustworthy interface where content is the hero, grounded in calm stability.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Use 'md' and 'lg' for layout spacing. No cramped components.

do's: Sticky headers when content scrolls behind

screens.name: Wallet Dashboard
screens.purpose: A secure home screen displaying total balance, core actions, and asset list.

states.empty: Illustration of a vault/wallet with 'No assets yet' and 'Deposit Crypto' CTA.
states.error: Readable error message with a Retry button.

screens.layout: Header with user avatar and settings gear. Large balance text (Geist) centered or left-aligned at top. A row of 4 circular action buttons (Send, Receive, Deposit, Fiat) using brandTertiary containers. Below, an 'Assets' section with a list of tokens. Each token row has a real icon, token name, balance, and fiat equivalent. Safe area padding strictly observed.

screens.name: Fiat Deposit & Receipt
screens.purpose: Input amount for fiat top-up and show the receipt of the transaction.

states.error: Error modal or inline error message below input.

screens.layout: Form layout with large numeric input at top. Keypad below. Sticky 'Continue' CTA at bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView. On success, show Receipt layout: a centralized ticket-style card with a green success icon, amount, dotted divider, date, transaction ID, and a 'Done' button.

screens.name: Secure Chat & Conversation
screens.purpose: End-to-end encrypted messaging list and thread.

states.empty: Illustration of chat bubbles with 'No secure chats yet'.

screens.layout: Inbox screen: list of conversations, avatars, contact names, last message preview, unread badges, and a subtle lock icon for secure indicator. Chat screen: Full-screen thread with glass header, left/right bubbles (surfaceSecondary for received, brandPrimary for sent). Composer at bottom with attachment and camera actions.

screens.name: Video Call

states.error: Call failed layout with red disconnect icon.

screens.layout: Full-bleed caller video. Self-view in a floating PIP (Picture in Picture) card top right. Bottom controls (mic, camera, end call) in a floating glassmorphic pill.

hero_card_texture.alt: Soft modern clean white textile abstract

avatar_caller.alt: Portrait of caller looking at camera

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for iOS-Native Clean style: use generous padding, clean borders (max 1pt), and minimal shadow.
Do NOT use any blues, indigos, or purples anywhere in the app. Use the defined moss/sage green brand palette for trust.

Implement the 'hero' wallet card or balance section with high-contrast text and consider using the subtle abstract texture image inside it to elevate the 'premium' feel without overpowering the balance.
For the secure chat list, add a small lock or shield icon to each contact indicating end-to-end encryption. Let the message bubbles use surfaceSecondary for received and brandPrimary for sent.
For fiat receipts, create a 'ticket' style layout using dotted border dividing the receipt content, giving a tactile real-world financial feel.
Ensure glassmorphism is used on the bottom tab bar and video call overlays, ensuring text readability over video streams.
Any branded crypto icons (BTC, ETH) should ideally use real PNG logos; if a placeholder is necessary, use a circular brandTertiary container with text.
Use Haptics as defined across the application, especially for transaction receipts and sending messages.
